hooks.command: file=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *.swift ]]; then cd /Users/jeong-ilin/study/clawde && swift build 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
file=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *"/.build/"* || "$file" == *"/Clawde.app/"* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: build artifact. Edit Sources/ instead.'; exit 1; fi
file=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *"/.claude/projects/"*.jsonl ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: session logs are read-only.'; exit 1; fi
